ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compression_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression test */,
  "image_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image set used in the test */,
  "block_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block size used in the test */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) of the compressed image */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the compression process */,
  "coding_time" REAL /* Time taken for the coding phase of the compression process */,
  "coding_rate" REAL /* Coding rate of the compression process */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression algorithm used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_tests_image_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_set_id") REFERENCES image_sets ("image_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_tests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_tests_block_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_size_id") REFERENCES block_sizes ("block_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_tests_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sets" (
  "image_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the image set */,
  "set_description" TEXT /* Description of the image set */,
  "set_size" TEXT /* Size category of the image set (e.g., Small, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_sizes" (
  "block_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block size */,
  "block_size_value" TEXT /* Value of the block size (e.g., 4x4, 8x8) */,
  "block_size_description" TEXT /* Description of the block size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the compression algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "image_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image set */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the image file (e.g., hdr, png) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "color_depth" TEXT /* Color depth of the image (e.g., 24-bit, 32-bit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_files_image_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_set_id") REFERENCES image_sets ("image_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image file */,
  "compressed_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the compressed image file */,
  "compressed_file_size" REAL /* Size of the compressed image file in MB */,
  "decompressed_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the decompressed image file */,
  "decompressed_file_size" REAL /* Size of the decompressed image file in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., start test, end test, update results) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image characteristic */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image file */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the image characteristic (e.g., camera model, aperture) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the image characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_characteristics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm parameter (e.g., quality setting, compression level) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the algorithm parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "hardware" TEXT /* Hardware used for the test (e.g., CPU, GPU) */,
  "software" TEXT /* Software used for the test (e.g., operating system, compiler) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression test */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES compression_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being validated */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Data validation rule (e.g., data type check, range check) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
